# Using magic to trade magic

Layer: Primary

# Overview

James’ agency is hired to help create a system to trade magic with magic.

# Hacking

The magic “network” is hacked at some point.

# Nivana

Tie this in with the [Nivana sorceress arc](Nivana%20sorceress%20arc%20ba9bd93692634691a49a337080acf339.md).  Her employers are involved with this network.
